name: desk_organiser_mesh_preserved_drawers_a1_handoff
description: Bambu A1 handoff for mesh-preserved functional drawer organiser. Source mesh triangles are partitioned across the fixed body and drawer fronts.

parts.name: desk_organiser_mesh_preserved_drawers_body_preserved_mesh
parts.notes: 419321 preserved source triangles; 463815 generated skin-shell triangles; 256 generated functional triangles.

parts.name: desk_organiser_mesh_preserved_drawers_drawer_1
parts.notes: 30305 preserved source triangles; 29229 generated skin-shell triangles; 92 generated functional triangles.

parts.name: desk_organiser_mesh_preserved_drawers_drawer_2
parts.notes: 5225 preserved source triangles; 5655 generated skin-shell triangles; 92 generated functional triangles.

parts.name: desk_organiser_mesh_preserved_drawers_drawer_3
parts.notes: 1859 preserved source triangles; 1353 generated skin-shell triangles; 92 generated functional triangles.

parts.name: desk_organiser_mesh_preserved_drawers_drawer_4
parts.notes: 33580 preserved source triangles; 32088 generated skin-shell triangles; 92 generated functional triangles.

notes: The mesh-preserved print 3MF and per-part STLs retain the source triangle skin.
The front-review 3MF is view-only and rotated for Bambu's camera to show the drawer side.
The source-skin preview 3MF contains only the original source triangles for visual proof.
The functional-core 3MF is diagnostic generated geometry only.
STEP is intentionally not emitted for the preserved mesh skin.
